questions.question: Describe the difference between a page directory and a page table in a computer's memory management unit. (4 marks)
questions.hint: How do they relate to each other?

questions.question: What is the purpose of the page global directory (PGD) in a computer's memory management system? (3 marks)
questions.hint: How does it interact with the page table?

questions.question: What is the advantage of using a translation lookaside buffer (TLB) in a computer's memory management system over a page table? (4 marks)
